name: Sherbanu''s Carrot & Cauliflower Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the cauliflower and carrots in boiling water for 1 minute.
2. Refresh the vegetables in cold water.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients in a bowl and let stand for about 1 hour, allowing the flavors to meld.
4. Serve cooled, but not chilled, as this will preserve the flavor.
